name: ocos-api
description: Internal OCOS plugin scaffold for exposing organization, project, incident, and report tooling to Codex.

interface.longDescription: Scaffold for future OCOS-native tooling so Codex can read incidents, reports, projects, and safe action surfaces from the OmniaCreata control plane.
defaultPrompt: Read the current OCOS org summary and highlight the top risks.
Open the Studio project cockpit and summarize active incidents.
Review the latest OCOS reports and recommend the safest next action.
